Package com.stardevllc.starmclib.item

Class ItemBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starmclib.item.ItemBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ArmorItemBuilder, AxolotlItemBuilder, BannerItemBuilder, BookItemBuilder, CompassItemBuilder, CrossbowItemBuilder, EnchantedBookBuilder, FireworkItemBuilder, FireworkStarBuilder, FishBucketBuilder, GoatHornBuilder, MapItemBuilder, SkullItemBuilder, StewItemBuilder
public class ItemBuilder extends Object implements Cloneable
A builder for Items
You can use the child classes to customize every type that has an ItemMeta
Note: This uses the XMaterial library to allow multi-version support
